calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Request For Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Request For Fees And Sanctions - The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Huibonhoa as follows: Granted. The requests for admission are deemed admitted. No monetary sanctions are imposed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Request For Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Fred Keeperman, 925.631.7710, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Cyleon Lo, 415.606.7936, Defendant appearing inpropria persona.

Ruling: A R G U E D; the Defendant did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem hearing this matter. Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'s Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Request For Fees And Sanctions is continued to October 9, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Ntc Of Mtn For Order For Deemed Admissions; Req. For Fees And Sanctions; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.'S Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Request For Fees And Sanctions is continued on the court's own motion to September 25, 2012 at 9:00 am in Department 302. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and is ordered to do so, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 302 no later than September 18, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not reported. =302/JPT
